attributes.name: PowerShell CSharpCodeProvider In-Memory Compile
attributes.description: Detects PowerShell ScriptBlock content that invokes System.CodeDom.CSharpCodeProvider with GenerateInMemory=true. HONESTCUE-class LLM-abuse malware uses this pattern to compile LLM-sourced C# at runtime without writing a PE to disk. The technique is inherently suspicious on endpoint fleets; legitimate PowerShell scripts rarely compile C#.
attributes.query: any where event.category in ("process","powershell") and (powershell.file.script_block_text : ("*CSharpCodeProvider*","*CompileAssemblyFromSource*")) and powershell.file.script_block_text : "*GenerateInMemory*"

technique.name: Obfuscated Files or Information: Compile After Delivery

author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Developer tooling compiling .NET plugins at startup

attributes.name: Reflective Assembly Load via byte[]
attributes.description: Detects PowerShell script blocks containing System.Reflection.Assembly::Load invoked with a byte[] argument. This is the canonical reflective assembly-load technique used by HONESTCUE stage 2 and many offensive .NET frameworks to avoid on-disk PE signatures.
attributes.query: any where event.category in ("process","powershell") and powershell.file.script_block_text : ("*[System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load*","*System.Reflection.Assembly.Load*","*[Reflection.Assembly]::Load*") and powershell.file.script_block_text : ("*[byte[]]*","*System.Byte[]*")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder

attributes.name: csc.exe Spawned by PowerShell
attributes.description: Detects the C# compiler csc.exe being spawned as a child of powershell.exe or pwsh.exe. This is the process-tree byproduct of CSharpCodeProvider.CompileAssemblyFromSource; the HONESTCUE stage-2 loader produces this event even when GenerateInMemory=true.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.name : "csc.exe" and process.parent.name : ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe")

technique.name: Obfuscated Files or Information: Compile After Delivery

author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder

attributes.name: Non-Installer Process Modifies Hosts File
attributes.description: Detects writes to %SystemRoot%\System32\drivers\etc\hosts by any process outside a narrow allowlist of installers and domain-join tools. HONESTCUE-class threats modify the hosts file to redirect trusted CDN hostnames to attacker-controlled servers. Any single match warrants investigation.
attributes.query: file where event.type in ("creation","change") and file.path : "?:\\Windows\\System32\\drivers\\etc\\hosts" and not process.name : ("TrustedInstaller.exe","TiWorker.exe","MsiExec.exe","setup.exe","dsregcmd.exe","djoin.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Enterprise software deployment with hosts-file edits

attributes.name: Unsigned PE Execution from %TEMP%
attributes.description: Detects process execution of a PE located under a %TEMP% directory where the binary is unsigned. HONESTCUE stage 3 fetches a payload from a spoofed CDN, drops to %TEMP%, and executes. The dropped PE is unsigned by design.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.executable : ("?:\\Windows\\Temp\\*","?:\\Users\\*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*") and process.code_signature.trusted == false
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Legacy application installers staging temp binaries

attributes.name: Non-Browser Process Contacts LLM API Endpoint
attributes.description: Detects HTTPS/TLS connections from non-browser processes to well-known LLM API hostnames. HONESTCUE-class malware issues POSTs directly to Gemini/OpenAI/Anthropic endpoints from a launcher process rather than a browser. Tune the allowlist to match the organization's approved AI tooling inventory.
attributes.query: network where event.type == "start" and destination.domain : ("generativelanguage.googleapis.com","api.openai.com","api.anthropic.com","api.cohere.ai") and not process.name : ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","Code.exe","devenv.exe","cursor.exe","windsurf.exe","zed.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder

attributes.name: Trusted CDN Hostname Resolves to Loopback or RFC1918
attributes.description: Detects DNS answers where a trusted CDN hostname (cdn.discordapp.com, media.discordapp.net, raw.githubusercontent.com) resolves to a loopback or RFC1918 private address. Strong indicator of hosts-file redirect or DNS hijack used to spoof a trusted CDN.
attributes.query: dns where event.type == "connection" and dns.question.name : ("cdn.discordapp.com","media.discordapp.net","raw.githubusercontent.com","api.github.com") and dns.resolved_ip : ("127.0.0.0/8","10.0.0.0/8","192.168.0.0/16","172.16.0.0/12","::1")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
